meta.title: AI Dev 25 | João Moura & Graham Steele: Real AI Agents in Action Automate, Adapt, and Scale
meta.description:
AI isn’t just about automation—it’s about building intelligent systems that can reason, adapt, and deliver real-world value.

In this hands-on, code-first workshop, João Moura, CEO of CrewAI, and Graham Steele, Senior Product Marketing Manager at Groq, guide attendees through building production-ready AI agents that go far beyond basic prompts and scripts.

Over the course of the session, participants:
– Built collaborative AI agents that can automate and adapt in real time
– Learned best practices for scaling agents into production
– Walked away with working code and insights you can apply immediately

Whether you're just starting with agents or looking to bring them into real applications, this session equips you with practical tools and a deeper understanding of what’s possible with agentic AI.

Keep building,
DeepLearning.AI
